data.title: Venezuela beats Team USA to claim World Baseball Classic - BBC
data.description: The Venezuelans defeated Team USA 3-2 in Miami on Tuesday, in a thrilling final.
data.content:
Venezuela has beaten Team USA to claim the World Baseball Classic (WBC) for the first time in a thrilling final. 
The 3-2 result in Miami on Tuesday stunned the star-studded US team, who had hoped t??[+238 chars]
data.author: Claire Keenan
